double_click_money_aid.text: Tip: Double click on money to move it to your stack.

aid1.detail:
How To Play
On Your Turn, place one tile onto an open space that matches the color of the tile's origin space. Place one money on each tile you pass moving clockwise to the chosen tile. Take all money under your chosen tile. Then click the 'Current Turn' button to end your turn
Cats & Tuna(B)
After placing a Cat, multiply the Cat's value by the number of adjacent Tuna(B) icons around it and gain this number of points.

After placing Tuna(B), sum the value of all adjacent Cats and gain this number of points.
Tigers (O), Lions(L), & Scoring Regions
Once every space within a region (white, brown, or green) is full, score the region before the next player take their turn. First score Tigers(O), then Lions(L):

Tiger(O) Scoring: The player with the most Tigers in the region scores points equal to all cat numbers within the region. If there is a tie then ignore Tigers and instead the player with the most Lions(L) gains these points (even if they have no Tigers there). If there is a Lions tie, no one scores these points.

Lion(L) Scoring:
Count the number of Lions in the scoring region. Then, check each adjacent region separately, counting the Lions there. If the adjacent region has less Lions, then add the Cat numbers in that region together and split it among all players with at least one Lion in the scoring region.
Game End & Scoring
The game ends after the last region has been scored. You gain points equal to your leftover money, most points wins! Tie is broken by the player who would have taken their turn sooner if the game had continued.

info.name: Cat City
info.attribution:
Game layout and scripting by Sergio De La Guera and Jonathan Cox, released to the Public Domain under CC0.

The following graphics are from https://www.publicdomainpictures.net/ and are released to the Public Domain under CC0:

Cover Image: https://www.publicdomainpictures.net/en/view-image.php?image=696819&picture=black-cat-paris-postcard

The following graphics are from https://game-icons.net and under CC BY 3.0:
Cat: https://game-icons.net/1x1/lorc/cat.html
Bastet: https://game-icons.net/1x1/delapouite/bastet.html
Feline: https://game-icons.net/1x1/delapouite/feline.html
Canned Fish: https://game-icons.net/1x1/delapouite/canned-fish.html
Lion: https://game-icons.net/1x1/lorc/lion.html
Saber Toothed Cat Head: https://game-icons.net/1x1/delapouite/saber-toothed-cat-head.html
Plain Circle: https://game-icons.net/1x1/delapouite/plain-circle.html
Money Stack: https://game-icons.net/1x1/delapouite/money-stack.html

The sound while changing turns is "Wrong Answer" by UNIVERSFIELD and is available under the Pixabay License at https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/wrong-answer-129254/.
info.description: Stake your cats turf and extort rival cats for money.
